title: Better Together
lesson: Working together as a team gets the job done and is much more fun.
prompts: On a sunny sandy beach, bright sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} kneels alone building a sandcastle, with a determined expression. A bucket and spade beside them. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

On a sunny sandy beach, bright sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} kneels in the sand as part of the sandcastle wall crumbles, with a frustrated, disappointed expression. Scattered sand and a tipped bucket beside them. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

On a sunny sandy beach, bright sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} is the only kneeling child by the sandcastle, wearing the outfit visible in the input image, face visible in a natural three-quarter view, one hand resting on the sandcastle wall and the other hand on the sand, with a hopeful expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_06} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06} walk up upright offering to help, both with eager, friendly smiles, their hands and gaze directed toward the kneeling child and the sandcastle. Exactly three children in the frame: one kneeling protagonist from the input image and two upright friends. Exactly three children in the frame, and no other people.

On a sunny sandy beach, bright sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} is patting sand onto a growing sandcastle, with a focused, happy expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_06} carries a bucket of water with a concentrated smile and {GENDER_F_AGE_06} digs sand with a cheerful expression, all working together. Make the interaction read physically: all three children's hands and gazes are directed to the one growing sandcastle between them — the child patting it, the boy bringing water to it, the girl digging sand for it. Exactly three children in the frame, and no other people.

On a sunny sandy beach, bright sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} kneels beside a tall finished sandcastle with towers and a little flag, with a proud, delighted smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_06} claps happily while looking at the sandcastle, and {GENDER_F_AGE_06} points happily at the sandcastle with one hand. Make the interaction read physically: all three children face the one finished sandcastle, with hands and gaze directed to that shared object. Exactly three children in the frame, and no other people.

On a sunny sandy beach, golden seaside light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} stands with arms raised in celebration beside the grand sandcastle, with a big joyful smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_06} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06} cheer together with delighted, triumphant expressions. Make the interaction read physically: all three children turn toward the one grand sandcastle they built, arms raised and cheering at it together. Exactly three children in the frame, and no other people.
gists: On a sunny sandy beach, the child kneels alone building a sandcastle, determined, with a bucket and spade beside them.
On the beach, the child kneels alone, frustrated and disappointed, as part of the sandcastle wall crumbles with sand scattered and the bucket tipped.
On the beach, the child kneels by the sandcastle, hopeful, while two friends, a boy and a girl, walk up offering to help.
On the beach, the child pats sand onto a growing sandcastle, focused and happy, while the boy carries a bucket of water and the girl digs sand — working as a team.
On the beach, the child kneels beside a tall finished sandcastle with towers and a little flag, proud, while one friend claps and the other points happily at the sandcastle.
On the beach in golden light, the child stands with arms raised in celebration beside the grand sandcastle while the two friends cheer — better together.
texts: On the sunny beach, {NAME} worked hard, building a sandcastle all alone. "Almost there," said {NAME}, patting the sand.
But the wall crumbled down! "Oh, not again," frowned {NAME}. It was tricky to build it all alone.
Just then two friends came over. "Can we help you?" they asked. "Yes please!" said {NAME}, hopeful again.
Together they patted sand, carried water and dug. "You build, I'll fetch water!" said the boy. "Look — it's growing!" cheered {NAME}.
At last the sandcastle stood proud, with towers and a little flag. "We made it!" cheered {NAME}. One friend clapped while the other pointed proudly.
{NAME} threw both arms up high, and they all celebrated together. "Better together!" laughed {NAME}. Teamwork was so much more fun.
